  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No fire watch was present during the hot work operations.",
    "No fire watch was maintained for the required post-work monitoring period."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all hot work operations in the area.",
    "Establish a dedicated fire watch to monitor the area for smoldering fires or ignition sources for at least 30 to 60 minutes post-work.",
    "Verify that a valid hot work permit is active and that all safety controls are fully implemented before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Performing hot work without a designated fire watch during and after the operation violates fundamental safety standards. NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require a dedicated fire watch to prevent catastrophic fire outbreaks from sparks, slag, or heat transfer.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Section 5.6",
    "OSHA 1926.352"
  ]
}
